task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the target meeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the SuiteCRM meeting details view or edit view for the meeting titled 'Global Widgets - Q3 Roadmap Sync'.
The 'Status' field for the 'Global Widgets - Q3 Roadmap Sync' meeting is visibly set to 'Held' in the edit or detail view.

task_completion.description: Create a related Note with the specified subject and body
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Note creation form or saved Note detail view showing the Subject as 'Q3 Roadmap Sync - Minutes' and the Description/Body containing 'Discussed feature timeline. Client approved the proposed rollout schedule.'

task_completion.description: Create a related Task with the specified subject
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Task creation form or saved Task detail view showing the Subject as 'Draft Q3 SLA Addendum'.

task_completion.description: Set the Task status to 'Not Started' and priority to 'High'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Task form or detail view for 'Draft Q3 SLA Addendum' shows the Status field set to 'Not Started' and the Priority field set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the new Note and Task are linked to the parent meeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Global Widgets - Q3 Roadmap Sync' meeting detail view shows the newly created Note and Task listed in its related subpanels (e.g., History, Activities, Notes, or Tasks subpanels at the bottom of the page), OR the Note/Task detail views show the meeting listed in their 'Related To' field.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM graphical user interface rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows executing SQL queries or cURL commands to the SuiteCRM API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the SuiteCRM instance address, and the UI elements match the standard SuiteCRM layout rather than a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected outputs into a text editor or unrelated form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs for the Note and Task are entered into the correct SuiteCRM form fields, not a generic text editor like Notepad or a terminal.
